name: Agent Librairy
description: Agent Library brings together specialized Python agents that execute each stage of application generation, verify the resulting work, and keep production workflow focused, reliable and useful.

name: Code Library
description: Code Library gathers reusable Python and Swift blocks, plus local UIs for testing them, so teams can assemble apps faster, validate each component, and avoid rebuilding all common foundations.

name: iOS Ready
description: iOS Ready organizes production-ready models and their registry files, giving teams a clear foundation for integrating tested AI capabilities directly into all apps across the Apple ecosystems.

name: Knowledge Librairy
description: Knowledge Library centralizes references that ground agents and models in trusted theories, guidelines and rules, helping the app make informed decisions instead of relying on hardcoded logic.

name: MCP Library
description: MCP Library groups shared servers and tools that autonomous agents can call safely, with each service clearly defining its limits, setup instructions and internal state for reliable execution.

name: Model Library
description: Model Library organizes portable, self-contained vision models that can be tested independently, validated in continuous integration, and exposed as MCP tools for reuse across AI applications.

name: Skills
description: Skills Library gathers focused, reusable capabilities that agents can apply across all apps, helping teams complete concrete tasks consistently without rebuilding the same workflows each time.
